title: Va Madhi Vadhana Lyrics Vaaliba Raja Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Va Madhi Vadhana
Singer(s): Radhan, Mukesh, Blaaze
Movie: Vaaliba Rajan
Music: Radhan
Lyrics: Karky

Girl I'm loving you like a
rain tomorrow.
Girl I'm loving you
now your heart I need to borrow
Girl I'm loving you like that
gonna blow my mind
Girl I'm in love for the very first time.

Vaa madhi vadhana kulappida vaa
ivan vaanathai kaluvi kavilthida vaa
dhivan vaasalai thelikka palakkida vaa
un vaathiuyam ivan en isaiththida vaa

lets go move your body
o go shake that body
common common move it for me
dance with me.

lets go move your body
common konjam shake that body
o go move it for me
dance with me.

Kaiyyil rendu bomma thandha
manda pichi oduvaaney
endha bomma vachi aada
kettu kettu kolluvaaney.

Yelele kuzhappam, ellaamey kuzhappam
adhu illana un vazhkka kasakkum.
idhu varaikkum ellaamey mayakkam
ini inithaan kuzhappamey thodakkam.

when you play with my mind down
i'm feeling like am
loosing mind loosing control
idhu enna enna yedho seidhaai
are you the one girl, are you my soul ?

Let me tell what it is
that am feeling inner feeling inner
which you feeling that too

Kadhal endru sonnaal anbae
baby i love youu.

vaa ila madhana kuzhambida vaa
indha vazhkayin kuzhappangal rasithidadaa
ini unakkena mudivugal eduththidathaan
ival vanathil irundhu ingu irangi vandhaal

Kannu mela vellari vachi
kannaa moochi aaduvaaley.
un kai kaalil noola katti
bommalaattam kaattuvaaley.

Vaayil poottu maatti vittu
coffee-ya pottu neettuvaa.

Yelele kuzhappam, ellaamey kuzhappam
adhu illana un vazhkka kasakkum.
idhu varaikkum ellaamey mayakkam
ini inithaan kuzhappamey thodakkam.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Va Madhi Vadhana'?

The song expresses the excitement and joy of falling in love for the first time, capturing the emotions of romance and longing.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Vaaliba Raja'?

This song plays a crucial role in depicting the romantic relationship between the lead characters, enhancing the overall narrative of the film.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features vocals by Blaaze, Mukesh, and Radhan, with music composed by Radhan himself.

When was 'Va Madhi Vadhana' released?

The song was released on July 1, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Va Madhi Vadhana, the characters express their newfound love in a playful and energetic manner, making it a perfect anthem for romantic moments. The song's upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics evoke feelings of joy and excitement, resonating with anyone who has experienced the thrill of love. As part of the movie Vaaliba Raja, it beautifully complements the narrative, showcasing the lightheartedness of young romance. Overall, it serves as a delightful reminder of the magic that love brings.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Va Madhi Vadhana from Vaaliba Raja is a vibrant celebration of love, brought to life by the unique collaboration of Blaaze, Mukesh, and Radhan. With its catchy beats and heartfelt lyrics, this song captures the essence of youthful romance. Dive into a musical journey that will surely make your heart flutter!
stanzaMeanings: Girl, I'm loving you like it's going to rain tomorrow. Girl, I'm loving you now; I need to borrow your heart. Girl, I'm loving you like this is going to blow my mind. Girl, I'm in love for the very first time.
Come, my dear, let's have fun. Come, let's explore the sky. Come, let's open the doors of heaven. Come, let me sing for you.
Let's go, move your body, oh go, shake that body. Come on, come on, move it for me, dance with me.
Let's go, move your body, come on, shake that body, oh go, move it for me, dance with me.
With two dolls in hand, the crazy one will run away. Which doll will dance, will be caught and held tight.
If you ask me about two stories, I will tell you the tale.
Oh, oh, confusion, everything is confusion. If not, your life will be troubled. Until now, everything is a dream; now, only confusion will begin.
When you play with my mind, I feel like I'm losing my mind, losing control. What is this? Are you the one, girl? Are you my soul?
Let me tell you what I'm feeling, the inner feeling, the inner feeling that you are feeling too.
When I say love, my dear, baby, I love you.
Come, my dear, let's enjoy this life. The troubles of this life will be sweet. If you come from that world to here, you will find solutions.
Come, my dear, come, my dear.
With your eyes, you will catch me, and your eyes will dance. In your hands, you will tie the thread and show the doll dance.
Putting it in your mouth, you will pour coffee and serve it hot.
Oh, oh, confusion, everything is confusion. If not, your life will be troubled. Until now, everything is a dream; now, only confusion will begin.
